name: devspace
description: A single-user **desktop AI workspace** — a Tauri (Rust) shell wrapping a local Python/FastAPI backend, supporting both **local and API LLM providers**. Inspired by [Odysseus](https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus): chat + agents, deep research, documents, email, calendar/notes/tasks, image gallery/editor, and local model management — all running on your machine, no login.
